summary: Frontend-only regression on public URL completed. Core routing and content updates are working (explore routing, 20 dogs, 20 cats, enquiry tel links, services with images/descriptions, footer social/email, blog SEO metadata, mobile home/explore checks).

issues: Home is not strictly minimal: fixed navbar tagline and full footer are still present, while requirement was logo + Start Your Journey CTA minimal presentation.
Transparent logo asset is used, but navbar/footer logo styling applies black circular background and border, which reduces the transparent-logo visual intent.

action_items: If strict requirement is intended, make home truly minimal by conditionally hiding/reducing navbar/footer elements on '/'.
Remove/adjust black background ring from navbar/footer logo classes to preserve transparent logo appearance.
Remove 'age' reference from pet profile SEO description text in PetProfilePage if age content must be fully removed from profiles.
critical_code_review_comments: Pet profile SEO description still includes 'age' wording (PetProfilePage.jsx), which can conflict with the 'remove age section' requirement intent.
Selector naming is highly reusable and mostly testable via data-testid; however, broad prefix selectors (e.g., dogs-card-*) can overcount because image/title/action elements share prefixes.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated on https://swap-companion.preview.emergentagent.com with desktop and mobile viewports. Functional checks passed for requested flows. For card counting, prefer action-button selectors ([data-testid^='dogs-card-action-'], [data-testid^='cats-card-action-']) to avoid inflated counts from nested elements.
rca of the issue: No blocking functional defect found. Remaining gaps are requirement interpretation/design-level mismatches: (1) home minimality not strict due to persistent navbar/footer content, (2) transparent logo visual softened by black logo container styling, (3) profile SEO copy still references age.
